# ProgramAnalysis

Dispatch named analysis queries against StoragePrograms to registered providers and return structured results . Each provider implements a specific analysis strategy ; this concept provides the uniform dispatch and result tracking interface

## Commands

### registerProvider
Analysis provider registered under the given name and kind classification .

**Arguments:** `$0` **name** (string), `$1` **kind** (string)

### run
Dispatch the analysis to the named provider and return the 
 structured result . The result format depends on the provider .

**Arguments:** `$0` **program** (string), `$1` **provider** (string)

### runAll
Run every registered provider against the program and return 
 all results keyed by provider name .

**Arguments:** `$0` **program** (string)

### listProviders
Return all registered provider names and their kind classifications .
